Cookies.metaDescription: Information about cookies and similar technologies used on the SafeBox website.
Cookies.title: Cookie Policy

definition.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
definition.text: Cookies are small data files that a website may store on a visitor’s device. They may support essential website functions, remember preferences, measure performance or enable third-party services.

currentUse.title: 2. Technologies Currently Used
paragraphs: The SafeBox website currently uses only the technologies reasonably necessary for website operation, security and contact-form submission.
SafeBox does not currently use advertising cookies or behavioural profiling technologies.

essential.purpose: Website operation, security, navigation and technical delivery.

forms.purpose: Processing contact enquiries and helping prevent automated spam submissions.
forms.status: Used when the contact form is submitted

advertising.purpose: Personalised advertising, profiling or cross-site tracking.

thirdParty.title: 3. Third-Party Technical Services
paragraphs: The website is available through the official SafeBox domain and may rely on specialist technical providers for hosting, security, email delivery and website infrastructure.
The contact form currently uses Formspree to process submissions. When a visitor submits the form, limited technical and contact information may be processed as necessary to deliver the enquiry.

If SafeBox introduces analytics, embedded maps, appointment booking, video, customer accounts, online payments or other third-party functionality, this policy will be updated before or when those technologies are activated.

consent.title: 4. Cookie Consent
paragraphs: Technologies that are strictly necessary for the website to function may be used without optional consent where permitted by law.
Optional cookies or similar technologies requiring consent will not be activated unless the visitor has received appropriate information and has made a valid choice.

management.title: 5. Managing Cookies
paragraphs: Visitors can control or delete cookies through their browser settings.
Blocking essential technical functions may affect the availability or correct operation of certain parts of the website.
Where SafeBox introduces a cookie-preference panel, visitors will also be able to review or change their preferences through that tool.

changes.title: 6. Changes to This Policy
paragraphs: SafeBox may update this Cookie Policy when website functionality, technical providers or legal requirements change.
The latest version will always be published on this page together with its revision date.

contact.title: 7. Contact
paragraphs: Questions concerning this Cookie Policy may be submitted through the contact form on the SafeBox website or sent to contactsafebox2026@gmail.com.
